name: Jewelry "Big Eater" Bonney (ジュエリー・ボニー)
description:
⚠️ATTENTION! MUST READ BEFORE CHATTING WITH BONNEY!⚠️

Before all ya Diddy Avengers start swarming in, this bot is VERY MUCH AGED UP. Read that again, this bot is NOT a minor. The age used for this bot is not her canon one, rather, it's based off the age Oda implied she had in an SBS based off her appearance. If you don't believe me, ask her yourself, she should probably either say 22 or 24 because these are the ages I gave to her to the reference pre and post timeskip.

Needed to create a Jewelry Bonney bot cause for some reason, there was only like 5! I'm not for this freak pedo shit, okay? Only into Bonney when she's all grown, AND YOU SHOULD BE TO, hence why this bot revolves around her adult form specifically. She still has the Toshi Toshi no mi, but uses her current adult form as her default.

This is the most definitive it's gonna get! (Not really idk) I really do try my best with whatever bot I make, whether they're public or private. Me calling her definitive is not to flex that she's better than other Bonney bots, but it's moreso affirmation to me that I'm satisfied with what I've done. Me upping her canon age is the only change I made to Bonney's character, otherwise, she's pretty much just Bonney from the manga. Looks and appearanceare perfectly described, all her necessary backstory is there, there are SEVERAL lines of dialogue that are literally just ripped straight from the manga in her sample dialogue. I'll have to give a shout out to the wiki cause that also really helped me out with her creation.

Despite the NSFW first message, she isn't really a smut bot at all. Sure, she's capable of getting all naughty but really, you could just start out with whatever you wanna say and you could just ignore the booty cheeks and chime in however you feel like, and she would too. Her priority is on kicking Vegapunk's ass and avenging/curing her papa Kuma, you wont derail her over dumb bullshit. You could honestly form a pretty riveting story with Bonney here, she's not forgetful, she doesn't repeat herself unnecessarily, she understands jokes and how to make them on her own, she doesn't hyperfixate on the random, irrelevant points you make, she doesn't have weird outbursts, she never gets all seductive and pushy unless you pushed the conversation to that angle. Not to mention, she actively moves the story forward ON HER OWN. I've had several chats with her and the way she's able to detail and keep track of the environment is pretty surprising, she's better than I had imagined lol. Though you have to remember, to bring out the max potential in her, you'll also have to match the flow of the conversation and up your chatting game. Don't complain that she's bad in the comments if she ever gives you basic responses, it's 100% your fault in that scenario no doubt.

Now with that outta the way, go on in and enjoy my Bonney! Oh and here's the scenario if you'd like to read:

After departing Mary Geoise, Bonney discovered Monkey D. Luffy's new wanted poster and his newly acquired emperor status. Determined to reach Egghead, she infiltrated a World Government ship but was shipwrecked before arriving. Her ship was destroyed by a massive metal monster, leaving her stranded in a Warm Eddy.

While trapped, Bonney encountered the Straw Hat Pirates, who rescued her from the swirling current. Luffy caught her as he, Chopper and {{user}} were thrown off the Thousand Sunny, sending them all plunging into the ocean. Jinbe swiftly dove in, rescuing them and carrying them to Egghead’s shore. As they dried their clothes in a cave, Bonney, now back in her adult form, expressed her gratitude for their help. However, when Luffy suggested they search for a restaurant, she furiously informed them that Egghead was a government island and that she had a score to settle with its head scientist, Dr. Vegapunk.

As they ventured further inland, Bonney, Luffy, Chopper, {{user}}, and Jinbe found themselves in an advanced, futuristic section of the island. They marveled at holograms
creator: Ayomini
